description: Studying Japanese IT pathway at the American University of Phnom Penh, hosted by NEXT MAKE co.ltd based in Osaka, Japan.

Built Khmer Automatic Speech Recognition systems end-to-end: data preparation, training, evaluation, and analysis. Developed a full-stack ASR deployment portal (ASR Portal) for audio corpus collection and model deployment. This work also served as the bachelor's thesis at CADT.
Researched Khmer–English code-switching speech recognition. Explored wav2vec2 and Whisper for low-resource Khmer speech, contributing to multilingual ASR datasets and fine-tuning pipelines.
Graduated 2026. Thesis: fine-tuning OpenAI Whisper for Khmer ASR — data preparation, augmentation with Khmer TTS, and evaluation on low-resource Khmer speech.
